Who I Am

Driven by curiosity,
defined by results.

I am Russel A. Monroy, a Magna Cum Laude graduate of Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from Osmeña Colleges, Batch 2025–2026. At 22 years old, I have already demonstrated a rare combination of technical depth, leadership capacity, and a vision for technology that genuinely transforms lives.

My academic journey was defined not just by excellent grades, but by the systems I built, the teams I led, and the problems I solved. From developing enterprise-grade software applications to engineering IoT-based solutions with robotic integration and AI-assisted cameras, I thrive at the intersection of software, hardware, and intelligent design.

As the Former President of the College of Computer Science Student Organization, I honed my ability to inspire, organize, and execute — managing cross-functional teams while maintaining academic distinction. I believe that the best engineers are not just coders — they are thinkers, communicators, and leaders.

I am passionate about building systems that are not just functional, but impactful — solutions that automate inefficiencies, empower communities, and push the boundaries of what technology can achieve.

🚀
Innovation First
I don't just build what exists — I reimagine what's possible and engineer solutions that set new standards.

Projects Completed
🏅
2025–2026
Magna Cum Laude Graduate
Graduated with Latin honors from Osmeña Colleges, recognizing sustained academic excellence, intellectual rigor, and consistent high performance throughout the BSCS program.
👑
Academic Year
President — CS Student Organization
Elected and served as President of the College of Computer Science Student Organization — leading governance, planning academic events, coordinating tech activities, and representing the CS community to the administration.
🤖
Capstone / Final Year
Robotic Arm with AI Camera System
Engineered an advanced robotic arm integrated with a robotic car and AI camera system for intelligent medicine arrangement and assessment — a project showcasing mastery of robotics, embedded systems, and computer vision.
📡
IoT Project
ESP IoT-Based Animal Detector
Developed an IoT-powered fur animal detection system using ESP microcontroller technology, integrating sensor arrays, wireless communication, and real-time alerting — demonstrating practical applied IoT engineering skills.
💻
Multiple Projects
Multi-Domain Software System Development
Designed and developed multiple enterprise-grade software systems spanning government services, HR management, e-commerce operations, and institutional evaluation — demonstrating broad domain expertise and system design capability.
Portfolio

Systems &
Projects Built.

Software
Evaluation System
A comprehensive digital evaluation platform that streamlines faculty and student performance assessment. Automates report generation, tracks KPIs, and provides data-driven insights for academic quality assurance.
Desktop App Database Analytics
View Project →
🏛️ Software
Business Permit Monitoring System
A government-grade digital solution for streamlining business permit applications, renewals, and compliance tracking. Features automated status alerts, document verification, and real-time permit lifecycle monitoring.
Gov. System Workflow Monitoring
View Project →
Software
Ordering System
A full-featured order management system with real-time inventory tracking, order processing workflows, and customer management. Designed for seamless operational efficiency in retail and food service environments.
E-Commerce Inventory Real-time
View Project →
Software
Voting System
A secure and transparent electronic voting platform engineered for institutional elections. Features encrypted vote recording, real-time result tabulation, audit trails, and tamper-proof data integrity mechanisms.
Security Encryption Real-time
View Project →
Software
Employee Management System
A robust HR and workforce management platform with modules for employee records, attendance tracking, payroll computation, performance evaluation, and comprehensive HR reporting dashboards.
HR System Payroll Dashboard
View Project →
📡 IoT
Fur Animals Detector — ESP IoT
An ESP microcontroller-based IoT system designed to detect the presence of fur animals in designated areas. Integrates motion sensors, wireless modules, and a real-time notification system — ideal for smart home and security applications.
ESP32 IoT Sensors Wireless
View Project →
Robotics · AI
Robotic Arm + AI Camera — Medicine Arranger
A groundbreaking robotics capstone project integrating a multi-axis robotic arm, autonomous robotic car, and AI-powered camera for intelligent medicine assessment and arrangement. Computer vision identifies, sorts, and places medications with precision — a leap toward smart healthcare automation.
Robotics Computer Vision AI Embedded
View Project →
